ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the security */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cik" TEXT /* Central Index Key (CIK) for SEC filings */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the security is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The specific industry within the sector */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the security */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the security was first listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* The opening and closing hours of the exchange */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* The main market index associated with the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the day */,
  "adjusted_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_high" REAL /* Adjusted highest price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_low" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price for splits and dividends */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "split_factor" TEXT /* The split factor if a split occurred on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* The period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* The source of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A score indicating the sentiment of the article */,
  "article_summary" TEXT /* A summary of the article */,
  "source_reliability" REAL /* A score indicating the reliability of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings report */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earnings report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue reported */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income reported */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) reported */,
  "eps_estimated" REAL /* Estimated EPS */,
  "eps_surprise" REAL /* EPS surprise (actual - estimated) */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* The percentage growth in revenue compared to the previous period */,
  "net_income_growth" REAL /* The percentage growth in net income compared to the previous period */,
  "eps_growth" REAL /* The percentage growth in EPS compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_reports_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Pay date */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of dividend payments */,
  "yield" REAL /* The dividend yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:1) */,
  "split_effective_date" TEXT /* The date the split becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The date of the user's last activity */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* The number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if notifications are enabled */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the watchlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the watchlist is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_securities" (
  "watchlist_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist security entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the security was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the security in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_securities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_securities_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission paid for the transaction */,
  "fees" REAL /* Any additional fees associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* The risk level of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_securities" (
  "portfolio_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio security entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price per share when purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the security was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the security in the portfolio */,
  "gain_loss" REAL /* The gain or loss on the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
